creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ross McKelvie from comment #1)

> … poudriere …

Please check that the option set before the build was truly effective for the built and installed package: 

pkg info nvidia-driver-470 | grep -A 4 Options

(I had at least two poudriere jails where options set with poudriere-options(8) were not effective.)
